results.text: Eternal Horizon: Lost in time. Perception disadvantage.
Blinding Sandstorm: Visibility zero. d4 damage per hour outside.
Echoes of Glory: Winds carry fragments of lost elven music.
Sudden Drought: Lose d4 water. Test Wits DR14 or suffer dehydration.
Fleeting Mirage: Drawn to a city or oasis. Test Wits DR12 to resist.
Light's Last Gasp: Flicker of beauty. +2 to Wits Tests for 1 hour.

name: Alfheim Discoveries
description: Lost elven wonders buried in sand.

results.text: Buried Elven Relic: A random Rune (fragile power).
Crumbling Tower: Ancient Runes and Trinkets. Collapses on failure.
Shattered Mirror of Light: Reassembly reveals a desired location.
Sunken Elven Temple: Sheltered rest, but guarded by magic.
Desiccated Corpse: Key to an elven vault or a trap.
Glowing Oasis: Regain d6 HP. Might be guarded by stalkers.
"The final city of Alfheim's glory lies buried and waiting."
"Mirage Stalkers hunt anyone with inscribed weapons."
"Elfric seeks allies to save Alfheim's fading magic."
"Eirwyn guards the last gate to somewhere untouched."
"Digging too deep in the sand awakens something hungry."
